name: Deploy

on:
  # push:
    # branches:
      # - main
    # comment-out on push logic as requested
    # branches: [ main ]
  workflow_run:
    workflows: ["compression.yml", "seo-assets.yml", "seo-pulse.yml", "seo-update.yml", "version-sync.yml"]
    types:
      - completed
  schedule:
    # Zero Maintenance: Monthly execution (Runs at 00:00 on day 1)
    - cron: '0 0 1 * *'
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: write
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: "pages"
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  process-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: ${{ github.event_name != 'workflow_run' || github.event.workflow_run.conclusion == 'success' }}
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout Repository (Main)
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          ref: main
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'

      - name: Install Minification Tools
        run: npm install -g terser html-minifier-terser

      - name: Set Version Logic
        run: |
          echo "VERSION=$(date +'%y.%m.%d')" >> $GITHUB_ENV
          echo "COMMITTEE_MSG=Automated Release - Optimized Build $(date +'%y.%m.%d')" >> $GITHUB_ENV

      - name: Build Optimized Assets
        run: |
          mkdir -p _site
          rsync -av --exclude='.git' --exclude='.github' . _site/
          
          # --- Flattening Logic ---
          # Checks if there's only 1 directory and 0 files in the root of _site
          if [ $(ls -1 _site | wc -l) -eq 1 ] && [ -d "_site/$(ls _site)" ]; then
            SUBDIR=$(ls _site)
            echo "Flattening: Moving contents of $SUBDIR to root"
            mv _site/$SUBDIR/* _site/ 2>/dev/null || true
            mv _site/$SUBDIR/.* _site/ 2>/dev/null || true
            rmdir "_site/$SUBDIR"
          fi

          # --- Minification (Performance & SEO) ---
          # JS Minification
          find _site -name "*.js" -exec terser {} -o {} --compress --mangle \;
          # CSS Minification (Preserves HSL brand colors)
          find _site -name "*.css" -exec html-minifier-terser --minify-css true --collapse-whitespace {} -o {} \;
          # HTML Minification
          find _site -name "*.html" -exec html-minifier-terser --collapse-whitespace --remove-comments --minify-js true --minify-css true {} -o {} \;

      - name: Cleanup Old Tags
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          # Tag Force-Delete to prevent "Already Exists" errors
          git push origin :refs/tags/∞ || echo "Tag not found, skipping delete."

      - name: Setup Pages
        uses: actions/configure-pages@v5

      - name: Upload Artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: './_site'

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

      - name: Display Release Information
        run: |
          echo "------------------------------------------------"
          echo "Committee Message: $COMMITTEE_MSG"
          echo "Data Attribute (Version): $VERSION"
          echo "------------------------------------------------"
